title: Crispy Buttery Sesame Malay Pilaf
description: A crispy and buttery vegetarian-friendly meal prepped dish featuring a blend of aromatic vegetables cooked with sous-vide method for maximum tenderness.
instructions: Cook the brown basmati rice according to package instructions and let it cool.
Dice butternut squash, red peppers, and green peppers into uniform pieces. Peel garlic cloves.
In a pan, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add diced peppers and cook until soft, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add cooked rice to the pan with peppers and add paprika powder, salt, and stir well to coat evenly.
Transfer the mixture to your sous-vide bag along with sesame seeds. Seal the bag, place in water bath at 68°C for about 1 hour.
Once done, remove from water bath, shake off excess water, then transfer the dish onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the remaining sesame oil over the top and sprinkle the chopped fresh cilantro leaves (optional). Bake in a preheated oven at 200°C for about 15 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Serve hot as a side dish.
